_meta.purpose: Tier 1 scenario taxonomy. Synonyms feed SKILL.md analyze step 4a for project-scenario detection. README/docs reference for community.
_meta.note: Synonyms are hints for AI scenario detection, not authoritative mappings. Claude may fall back to Tier 2 (capability-based) when synonyms are ambiguous.

academia.description: Academic research, paper writing, citation analysis, scientific reasoning over literature

finance.description: Financial analysis, trading strategies, market reports, accounting, risk modeling

health.description: Clinical reasoning, medical Q&A, patient triage, drug interactions, medical record summarization

legal.description: Contract analysis, case law research, compliance review, legal drafting

marketing.description: Copywriting, content marketing, ad creative, brand voice, social posts

marketing/seo.description: Search-engine-optimized content, keyword research, meta descriptions, schema markup

programming.description: Code generation, refactoring, debugging, code review, autonomous coding agents

roleplay.description: Persona-driven conversation, companion bots, interactive fiction, character chat

science.description: Scientific reasoning beyond academia: biology, chemistry, physics, math problem solving

technology.description: DevOps, infrastructure, sysadmin, technical Q&A, tooling automation

translation.description: Language translation, localization, i18n, multilingual content adaptation

trivia.description: General knowledge Q&A, factoid lookup, quiz, encyclopedic queries, personal assistant chat
